header_info.title: Global Hydropower Tracker - March 2026
header_info.citation: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Hydropower Tracker, March 2026 release"  (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
header_info.contact: Contact: Joe Bernardi, Project Manager, Global Hydro and Nuclear Trackers, Global Energy Monitor: joe.bernardi@globalenergymonitor.org

sections.section_name: This update covers all regions of the globe, and uses the United Nations’ Statistics Division definitions of region and subregion. All prospective facilities, as well as any for which there was an indication of changed status, were researched for updates.

entries.name: Hydropower project capacity cut-off, global
entries.definition: <30 MW not included

entries.name: Hydropower project capacity cut-off, global
entries.definition: <10 MW not included

entries.name: announced
entries.definition: Described in corporate or government plans but have not yet taken concrete steps such as applying for permits.

entries.name: pre-construction
entries.definition: Actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.

entries.name: construction
entries.definition: Site preparation and equipment installation are underway.

entries.name: operating
entries.definition: Formally commissioned; commercial operation has begun.

entries.name: shelved
entries.definition: Suspension of progress has been announced.

entries.name: shelved - inferred 2 y
entries.definition: Inferred to be shelved if no progress has been observed for at least two years.

entries.name: cancelled
entries.definition: A cancellation announcement has been made.

entries.name: cancelled - inferred 4 y
entries.definition: Inferred to be cancelled if no progress has been observed for at least four years.

entries.name: mothballed
entries.definition: Disused, but not dismantled.

entries.name: retired
entries.definition: Decommissioned.

entries.name: conventional storage
entries.definition: The project typically or entirely generates electricity from water stored in a reservoir.

entries.name: pumped storage
entries.definition: The project generates electricity using water which is cycled between a lower and an upper reservoir by a pumping system.

entries.name: run-of-river
entries.definition: The project typically or entirely generates electricty from flowing water with little to no storage capacity.

entries.name: unknown
entries.definition: Technology type not specified.

entries.name: conventional and pumped storage
entries.definition: The project has both conventional storage and pumped storage capability.

entries.name: conventional and run-of-river
entries.definition: The project has both conventional storage and run-of-river capability.

entries.name: Date Last Researched
entries.definition: Date that this project was last researched
entries.notes: Units: yyyy-mm-dd.

entries.name: Country/Area 1
entries.definition: Primary country/area where the project is located (unabbreviated)
entries.notes: If project is binational, Country/Area 1 is either the country/area listed first in alphabetical order for projects where capacity is shared equally, or the country/area with a larger portion of the total project capacity.

entries.name: Country/Area 2
entries.definition: Additional country/area where the project is located (unabbreviated)
entries.notes: If project is binational, Country/Area 2 is either the country/area listed second in alphabetical order for projects where capacity is shared equally, or the country/area with a smaller portion of the total project capacity.

entries.name: Project Name
entries.definition: Commonly used name
entries.notes: Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name used by the owner or operating company is listed.

entries.name: Project Name (local lang/script)
entries.definition: Commonly used name in the locally used script

entries.name: Other Name(s)
entries.definition: Alternative names, including the name in local script

entries.name: Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Total nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the project, in megawatts
entries.notes: Units: MW.

entries.name: Binational
entries.definition: Indicates whether the project is located on an international boundary
entries.notes: Units: Yes / No.

entries.name: Country/Area 1 Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Gross capacity, or best available data, of the portion of the project which is located in Country/Area 1, in megawatts, rounded to whole number
entries.notes: Units: MW. Capacity cutoffs mentioned above apply to the project as a whole, not necessarily to the portions of an international project which are within the boundaries of one country/area.

entries.name: Country/Area 2 Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Gross capacity, or best available data, of the portion of the project which is located in Country/Area 2, in megawatts, rounded to whole number
entries.notes: Units: MW. Capacity cutoffs mentioned above apply to the project as a whole, not necessarily to the portions of an international project which are within the boundaries of one country/area.

entries.name: Turbines
entries.definition: Turbine number and capacity
entries.notes: Information about the project's turbines, semicolon-separated.

entries.name: Status
entries.definition: see rows 22-31 above

entries.name: Complex
entries.definition: Name of the complex that this project is a part of, if any
entries.notes: Used to link together multiple projects that are part of a collection of related power-generating infrastructure but which should be considered different plants due to distinct physical infrastructure, geographic separation, and/or other factors such as ownership or operation. Left blank if not part of a complex.

entries.name: Start Year
entries.definition: Year the project was or will be commissioned
entries.notes: Units: yyyy.

entries.name: Retired Year
entries.definition: Year the project was or will be taken offline
entries.notes: Units: yyyy.

entries.name: Owner
entries.definition: The company that directly owns the project
entries.notes: If percent ownership is known, format is CompanyA [X%]; CompanyB [Y%].

entries.name: Owner Name (local lang/script)
entries.definition: Company name(s) of owner(s) in the locally used script

entries.name: Operator
entries.definition: The company(ies) that operates the project
entries.notes: Company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the project.

entries.name: Operator Name (local lang/script)
entries.definition: Company name(s) of operator(s) in the locally used script

entries.name: Technology Type
entries.definition: see rows 34-39 above

entries.name: River / Watercourse
entries.definition: The name of the river or watercourse on which the project is located

entries.name: Latitude
entries.definition: Latitude of the project, assumed WGS84 (Google Maps)
entries.notes: Units: decimal degrees.

entries.name: Longitude
entries.definition: Longitude of the project, assumed WGS84 (Google Maps)
entries.notes: Units: decimal degrees.

entries.name: Location Accuracy
entries.definition: Approximate based on using nearest city or other information in research, or exact based on visibility on map or given in research
entries.notes: Units: approximate, exact.

entries.name: City 1
entries.definition: City, town, or village where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: Local Area 1
entries.definition: County or taluk where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: Major Area 1
entries.definition: Prefecture or district where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: State/Province 1
entries.definition: Subnational unit where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: Subregion 1
entries.definition: Subregion (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: Region 1
entries.definition: Region (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where project is located within Country/Area 1

entries.name: City 2
entries.definition: City, town, or village where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: Local Area 2
entries.definition: County or taluk where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: Major Area 2
entries.definition: Prefecture or district where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: State/Province 2
entries.definition: Subnational unit where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: Subregion 2
entries.definition: Subregion (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: Region 2
entries.definition: Region (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where project is located within Country/Area 2, if applicable

entries.name: GEM location ID
entries.definition: GEM-generated ID unique for each project

entries.name: GEM unit ID
entries.definition: GEM-generated ID unique for each unit

entries.name: Wiki URL
entries.definition: URL of GEM.wiki pages
entries.notes: Wiki page links not included for Below Threshold projects.
